title: Aureline mapping-quality record for debug frames, source navigation, and dump cards
description: Boundary schema for the mapping_quality_record every debug frame, every 'Go to source' jump, every variable / watch source-jump, and every dump-card frame narrows to before navigating. The record carries the closed mapping_quality_class vocabulary frozen in docs/execution/debug_truth_contract.md (exact / approximate / symbol-only / unresolved / build-mismatch / imported-symbol / no-symbol) plus the typed fallback_action_class vocabulary the renderer uses when navigation is denied or degraded. Each row joins a debug_artifact_entry_record (schemas/debug/debug_artifact_manifest.schema.json) so the same row token-for-token appears on the debugger UI, the support-bundle anchor, and the release artifact-graph node. Raw source bytes, raw absolute paths, raw URLs, raw register state, raw memory bytes, and raw symbol bytes MUST NOT cross this boundary; rows carry refs, hashes, counts, and class labels only. Adding a new enum member, a new optional field, or a new sub-record kind is additive-minor with a mapping_quality_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing member is breaking and requires a new decision row.

mapping_quality_schema_version.description: Document-level schema version. Bumped on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields and new enum members do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in support / evidence / replay exports. Raw absolute paths, raw URLs, raw symbol bytes, and raw source bytes never appear here.

opaque_ref.description: Opaque ref to another record (debug_artifact_entry_record, debug_session_record, debug_frame_record, command-dispatch descriptor, exact-build identity, etc.). Consumers resolve refs through the owning registry.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 UTC timestamp captured from a monotonic clock source.

short_sentence.description: Short reviewer-facing sentence safe to show in preview, history, and export-review surfaces. Raw command lines, raw env bodies, raw secret values, raw API bodies, and raw stack traces MUST NOT appear here.

redaction_class.description: Redaction posture for the record. metadata_and_hashes_only is the default; broadened_capture requires an explicit approval-ticket ref.

mapping_quality_class.description: Closed mapping-quality vocabulary. mapping_exact_full_source_and_symbols requires field-for-field build-identity verification and a source-bytes hash match. mapping_approximate_lines_only_no_columns drops column / inline detail but keeps line truth. mapping_symbol_only_no_source_lines names the symbol with no line table. mapping_unresolved_no_source_no_symbols admits the address has no resolved mapping. mapping_build_mismatch_resolved_to_different_build records a found-but-rejected candidate; navigation MUST NOT proceed. mapping_imported_symbol_external_dependency_only flags a third-party / OS-framework frame; navigation goes to a pinned summary, not local source. mapping_no_symbol_unmapped_address_disasm_fallback admits no symbol record exists. mapping_quality_unknown_requires_review fails closed and forbids navigation.

fallback_action_class.description: Closed fallback-action vocabulary. Names what the renderer should open when the user invokes 'Go to source' on a row whose mapping_quality_class is anything other than exact / approximate. open_no_navigable_target_show_address_only is the load-bearing answer for build-mismatch rows; the renderer surfaces only the address with a typed mismatch chip and forbids navigation. open_redacted_under_redaction_class is the answer when the row's redaction class hides any source location.

evidence_state_class.description: Whether the resolver walk that produced this mapping_quality row has completed. evidence_pending_resolver_walk is admissible only while the walk is in flight; evidence_unresolved_offline names a walk that bottomed out without reaching higher-trust sources. evidence_state_unknown_requires_review fails closed and forbids navigation.

build_match_field_class.description: Re-export of schemas/debug/debug_artifact_manifest.schema.json#expected_build_match_fields. Mapping-quality rows that claim mapping_exact_* MUST cite the same axes the resolver verified field-for-field.

mismatch_reason_class.description: Re-export of schemas/debug/debug_artifact_manifest.schema.json#mismatch_reason_class. mapping_quality rows that claim mapping_build_mismatch_resolved_to_different_build MUST cite at least one matching token here.

denial_reason_class.description: Closed denial-reason vocabulary for mapping_quality_record refusals. Every refusal fails closed and cites exactly one value.

audit_event_id.description: Closed audit-event id vocabulary for the mapping_quality_record family. Raw bodies, raw command lines, raw env bodies, raw API bodies, and raw secret values MUST NOT appear on any audit event.

mapping_quality_record_id.description: Opaque, stable id for one mapping_quality row. Debugger UI, support bundle, and release artifact graph surfaces resolve this id field-for-field rather than minting a parallel id per surface.

debug_artifact_ref.description: Ref to the debug_artifact_entry_record (schemas/debug/debug_artifact_manifest.schema.json) the row resolved against. Same id token-for-token across debugger UI, support bundle, and release artifact graph.

module_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the module-identity row the mapping resolved against (e.g. PDB debug-id, Mach-O UUID, GNU build-id, source-map digest). Pinned by the joined debug_artifact_entry_record's content_linkage.module_identity block.

frame_ref.description: Optional ref to the debug_frame_record this mapping_quality row resolves for. Null when the row resolves a non-frame navigation target (e.g. a watch / variable source-jump or a dump-card frame projection).

watch_or_variable_ref.description: Optional ref to the debug_watch_record or debug_variable_record this mapping_quality row resolves a source-jump for. Null when the row resolves a frame instead.

module_offset_present.description: Whether the row carries a module-offset (relative to the module base). Raw address bytes never appear here; only the boolean is admissible.

oneOf.description: Compact address summary. Raw address values MUST NOT appear here; renderers project the typed address-kind class plus an offset-present boolean.

expected_build_match_fields.description: Required non-empty when quality_class is mapping_exact_full_source_and_symbols or mapping_approximate_lines_only_no_columns; the row MUST cite the axes the resolver verified field-for-field. MUST be empty when quality_class is mapping_unresolved_no_source_no_symbols / mapping_no_symbol_unmapped_address_disasm_fallback / mapping_quality_unknown_requires_review.

mismatch_reasons.description: Required non-empty when quality_class is mapping_build_mismatch_resolved_to_different_build; cites the typed mismatch tokens the resolver recorded. MUST be empty when quality_class is mapping_exact_* or mapping_approximate_*.

display_label.description: Short redaction-safe label (e.g. 'serde 1.0.197', 'CoreFoundation', 'libc.so.6 (glibc 2.39)'). Raw absolute paths and raw URLs never appear here.

version_or_revision_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the pinned version / revision row for this dependency.

package_or_module_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the package / module identity row (e.g. crates.io package digest, npm package digest, framework UUID).

oneOf.description: Required non-null when quality_class is mapping_imported_symbol_external_dependency_only. Names the dependency, the pinned version, and the package / module identity so the renderer can open a typed summary card instead of a generic 'no source' chip.

source_ref.description: Opaque ref to the source row the renderer opens (workspace-relative file ref, decompiled-source ref, dependency summary ref, or disasm view ref). Null when target_kind_class is address_only_no_navigable_target / redacted_under_redaction_class / navigation_target_unknown_requires_review.

line_number.description: Line number to navigate to (1-based). Null when target_kind_class is anything other than workspace_relative_source_ref / pinned_decompiled_source_ref.

column_number.description: Column number to navigate to (1-based). Null on mapping_approximate_* rows by definition (column / inline detail is absent).

oneOf.description: Typed navigation target the renderer resolves when the user invokes 'Go to source'. MUST be consistent with fallback_action_class: open_authoritative_source / open_pinned_decompiled_source resolve workspace_relative_source_ref / pinned_decompiled_source_ref; open_imported_symbol_summary resolves imported_dependency_summary_ref; open_disasm_view resolves disasm_view_ref; open_no_navigable_target_show_address_only resolves address_only_no_navigable_target.

audit_event_refs.description: Ordered refs to audit-event ids drawn from this schema's audit_event_id vocabulary. Raw bodies never appear.

denial_reason_class.description: Closed denial reason when the record is published as a typed refusal. Null on admitted records.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Required when redaction_class is broadened_capture. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: mapping_exact_* and mapping_approximate_* rows MUST cite the build-match fields the resolver verified.
mapping_build_mismatch_* rows MUST cite at least one mismatch reason and MUST resolve fallback_action_class to open_no_navigable_target_show_address_only.
mapping_imported_symbol_* rows MUST cite an imported_dependency_summary and MUST resolve fallback_action_class to open_imported_symbol_summary.
mapping_no_symbol_* and mapping_unresolved_* rows MUST resolve fallback_action_class to a disasm or address-only view.
mapping_quality_unknown_requires_review fails closed and forbids navigation.
